scripts.build: pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql-codegen-plugin build && pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql codegen && pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql build && pnpm --filter @team-plain/ui-components build && pnpm --filter @team-plain/webhooks build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql-codegen-plugin exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @team-plain/ui-components exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @team-plain/webhooks exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @team-plain/graphql-codegen-plugin test && pnpm --filter @team-plain/ui-components test && pnpm --filter @team-plain/webhooks test
